title: What would you like to do?
subtitle: Pick a task to start — you can also drop files straight onto a card

card.generateTranslateDesc: Transcribe speech and translate it into your target language in one go
card.translateDesc: Translate SRT and other subtitle files into another language
card.proofreadDesc: Review line by line, with video preview and AI polish
card.mergeDesc: Burn subtitles into the picture so they always show

banner.noModel: No speech model yet — it turns speech into text. Download one to get started
banner.noProvider: Want translated subtitles? Set up a translation service first (free options available)

noRecentTasks: No tasks yet — pick one above to get started

recent.deleteDesc: This removes the "{{name}}" task record. Files on disk are not affected.

allTasks.title: All tasks
allTasks.description: Browse, filter, and manage all recent task records
allTasks.clearAllDesc: This removes {{count}} task records. Files on disk are not affected.

noRecentTasksHint: Finished tasks appear here. Drag files onto a card above to get started
